title: LlmSessionSummaryEvent
description: Input for the LLM gateway plugin on_session_summary call. Chat Engine passes the full visible message history. The plugin decides which messages to summarize based on its summarization_settings in PluginConfig.config.

enabled_capabilities.description: Capability values active for this summarization

messages.description: Full visible message history (is_hidden_from_backend = false). During re-summarization, includes the previous summary message. The plugin splits this list into to_summarize and to_keep based on summarization_settings in its PluginConfig.
